monday.description: Pan-seared Spatchcock Chicken served with sautéed Bunashimeji Mushrooms and Gluten-free Spaghetti, finished with Macadamia Oil.

tuesday.description: Slow-cooked Beef Short Ribs served with steamed Anaheim Peppers and Organic Aged Basmati Rice, accompanied by a side of Low-fat Salted Lassi.

wednesday.description: Braised Lamb Shank in a rich broth with Dried Porcini Powder and served with Organic Sticky Rice, garnished with Dried Pandan Leaves.

thursday.description: Pan-seared Herring served with roasted Sweet Potatoes and Gluten-free Cheese Ravioli, finished with Avocado Oil.

friday.description: Roasted Cornish Hen served with sautéed Mung Bean Sprouts and Gluten-free Mantou, finished with Whipping Cream.

monday.description: Grilled Aged Gouda served with steamed Cabbage and Whole Grain Kamut Berries, accompanied by a side of Full-fat Dahi.

tuesday.description: Pan-seared Smoked Paneer served with stir-fried Organic Habanero Peppers and Gluten-free Chow Mein Noodles, finished with Cocktail Sauce.

wednesday.description: Grilled Sliced Gorgonzola served with sautéed Shallots and Gluten-free Idli, finished with Organic Ghee.

thursday.description: Roasted Pine Nuts served with steamed Organic Napa Cabbage and Hamburger Buns, accompanied by a side of Reduced-sodium Marinara Sauce.

friday.description: Grilled Sliced Feta served with sautéed Organic Endive and Rice Noodles, finished with Reduced-sodium Alfredo Sauce.
